notes: EnvPool state lives on SimSessionStub (env_pool_size/steps_emitted/total_reward + env_last_obs*). sim_rl_session_env_pool_step loads/stores session pool across frames; env_obs_from_session exposes last post-step contract. New smoke env_pool_step_contract.li proves persistence + obs/reward contract. PH-ML async workers and li-ml-rl package remain future.
